title: citrus granulata
intro: Citrus granulata, also known as the 'Mountain Lemon', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Citrus granulata include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Citrus granulata is often prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or powder, making it easily accessible for those looking to incorporate its medicinal properties into their daily routine.
